work_wit.alt_title: Book of Hours for the period of the Nativity, Epiphany, and Good Friday
work_wit.as_written: كتبة سواعى بزمونى الميلاد وبزمونى الغطاس والجمعه الكبيره (f. 147v)

excerpt.as_written: الساعة الاوَلة. تقول قدَوس الله وَما يتلوَها
translation: The First Hour: Say, “Most Holy God…” and what follows next

excerpt.as_written: وَالسبح لله دايماً وَعلينا رحمته امين
translation: And glory to God, and His mercy upon us. Amen

note: Further subdivided with rubrics for the various hours and includes readings from the Psalms and other prayers

excerpt.as_written: التسبحه الاولى على وزن معيناً وساترا صار لى للخلاص
translation: The first hymn in meter: My helper and shelter He became for me in salvation…

excerpt.as_written: وبك ترحص كل محنه وتسبى المحاربين اياها. وتتبع المطيع. والسبح لله دايماً
translation: And with You, every trial is made to flee, the warriors are taken prisoner, and the obedient are attended to. And glory to God always

note: This canon is further subdivided into nine metrical hymns (or odes), in which there is also further rubrication for various parts of the hymns.

work.desc_title: Prayer spoken before receiving the Holy Eucharist

work_wit.as_written: هذه الصَلاه تقال قبل اخذ القربان المقدسَ (f. 205v)

excerpt.as_written: قدوسَ قدوسَ قدوسَ انت يالله قدسَ نفسَی وجسَدي وروحى
translation: Holy, holy, holy are you, O God. Sanctify my soul, my body, and my spirit…

excerpt.as_written: بك سُررت ان تغذینی انا الخاطى على مايدتك المحييه الغير مايته الذي اسالك ان تحفظ
translation: Rather, I was pleased that You would feed me, a sinner, at Your life-giving and immortal table which I ask that You would sustain…

work.desc_title: Teaching from the treatise of Anba Stephen of the Thebaid

excerpt.as_written: الان يا ابني قبل كل شى اكفر بالعالم وابتعد من ارضك ومن جنسك
translation: Now, my son, before all else depart from the world and renounce your country and your kin…

excerpt.as_written: تكون اعمالك ذكيه لكى يستجيب للله منك عاجلاً
translation: ...let your deeds be redolent that God may respond to you sooner...

cataloguer.message: Texts identified and described as part of the NEH Sinai Data Portal project (2021-2024).
